question: Chapters
feedback: The text does list the main sections of the thesis but uses Latvian terms which might not be clear to all readers.

question: Description
feedback: The text briefly describes the contents of each section, providing a good overview of what will be covered in each chapter.

question: Structure
feedback: While the text provides an overview of each section, it could benefit from a clearer statement about how these sections relate to each other and form the overall structure of the thesis.
